sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98304" key="sumbo/lhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμβόλ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= foreg. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope></bibl>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.37</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
